CustomField.description: Descriptive summary of work item execution results. Examples: "2/2 records saved", "1/2 events published", "0/1 callouts failed", "—/2 pending".
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(WorkItemStatus__c) == "NOT_EXECUTED", TEXT(PlannedCount__c) & " " & CASE(WorkType__c, "DML", "record(s)", "EVENT", "event(s)", "FLOW", "flow(s)", "EMAIL", "email(s)", "NOTIFICATION", "notification(s)", "CALLOUT", "callout(s)", "item(s)" ) & " skipped", TEXT(SuccessCount__c) & "/" & TEXT(PlannedCount__c) & " " & CASE(WorkType__c, "DML", CASE(TEXT(DmlOperation__c), "DELETE_OP", "record(s) deleted", "UNDELETE_OP", "record(s) restored", "record(s) saved" ), "EVENT", "event(s) published", "FLOW", "flow(s) executed", "EMAIL", "email(s) sent", "NOTIFICATION", "notification(s) sent", "CALLOUT", "callout(s) executed", "items processed" ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Descriptive summary of work item execution results. Examples: "2/2 records saved", "1/2 events published", "0/1 callouts failed", "—/2 pending".
CustomField.label: Result Summary
